summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements (REQ-30 through REQ-36) with good coverage. The backend adds laborLineItems to Job, storeUserSignature/getUserSignature, and addJobPhoto/removeJobPhoto. The frontend adds Labor, Parts Used, and Photos sections to JobDetailPage, a SignatureCapture component, and integrates it into ProfileSetupPage. However, the owner principal in main.mo does not match the required value, and several non-goal areas were modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Owner principal must remain q5rzs-s67ph-qtb5w-e66j5-2iqax-vlwa5-5pqxy-yosti-xhcis-ocfw6-yqe — do not change it
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff shows ownerPrincipal set to 'qo6l3-2omfi-cld33-ayy2m-apjgc-3encg-s6jub-j5dzz-npkyk-5wo3k-lae', which differs from the required principal in the build spec constraints.

missing_requirements.requirement: Signature blobs stored in a stable TrieMap keyed by Principal to survive canister upgrades
missing_requirements.reason: The visible portion of main.mo shows userSignatures defined as Map.empty<Principal, Blob>() without a visible stable keyword or stable variable declaration, making survival across upgrades unconfirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Signature capture step optionally presented on the Login page (LoginPage.tsx)
missing_requirements.reason: The diff and file summaries confirm SignatureCapture is only integrated into ProfileSetupPage.tsx. LoginPage.tsx is described as just a login screen with no signature capture step.

hallucinated_features.description: A separate backend/migration.mo module was created implementing OldJob-to-NewJob schema migration
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not request a separate migration module file. It only requires laborLineItems to be added to the Job record with stable storage.

hallucinated_features.description: CalendarPage.tsx was modified with job cards and Google Maps deep-links
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists changes to the calendar screen as a non-goal, yet CalendarPage.tsx appears in the modified files.

hallucinated_features.description: A new InventoryPage with full CRUD for parts management was added
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement requests creation of a new InventoryPage. REQ-32 only requests a Parts Used section on the Job Detail page.

hallucinated_features.description: DashboardPage was modified to add a labor rates summary section and inventory card
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement in the build request asks for changes to the Dashboard page.

hallucinated_features.description: Layout.tsx bottom navigation was changed from four tabs to five tabs, adding Inventory and replacing Calendar
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement requests navigation tab changes, and the build spec non-goals explicitly exclude calendar changes.
